title: What Are Guitar Preamp Pedals And How To Use Them
description:
What's the deal with preamp pedals? If our amps already have a preamp section why would we want preamp pedals? Well that's exactly the question we are going to answer in this episode. Let me know in the comments what your favorite preamp pedals are or if this is the first time you've ever hear of them. 

https://www.thejhsshow.com/
https://www.patreon.com/thejhsshow
https://www.jhspedals.info/

Check out the gear in this and past episodes here:
https://reverb.com/c/jhs-pedal-picks?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott

Gear in this video:
1:44 DOD Overdrive Preamp 250 
https://reverb.com/p/dod-overdrive-preamp-250?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
1:49 Boss OD-1
https://reverb.com/p/boss-od-1-overdrive?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
1:53 TS808 Tube Screamer
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-ts-808-tube-screamer-2012-green?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
2:30 DOD 410 Bifet Boost
https://reverb.com/p/dod-410-bifet-boost?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
2:33 DOD Bi-Fet Preamp FX10
https://reverb.com/p/dod-bi-fet-preamp-fx10?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
3:02 Boss FA-1 FET Amplifier
https://reverb.com/p/boss-fa-1-fet-amplifier?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
3:44 JHS Clover Preamp
https://reverb.com/p/jhs-clover-preamp?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
5:00 Keeley Caverns Delay Reverb V2
https://reverb.com/p/keeley-caverns-delay-reverb-v2?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
5:00 JHS Panther Cub V2
https://reverb.com/p/jhs-panther-cub-v2?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
5:00 JHS Lucky Cat
https://reverb.com/p/jhs-lucky-cat-delay?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
5:00 TS9 Tube Screamer
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-ts9-tubescreamer?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
5:00 JHS Clover Preamp 
https://reverb.com/p/jhs-clover-preamp?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott

Record Time:
Counting Crows - Recovering The Satellites 
https://amzn.to/30skN5I

Josh’s record player is by U-Turn Audio:

#jhs #thejhsshow #preamp

entire EQ section and you just have a pure clean boost then when we go to the middle section we have no mid control and that is the exact one for one FA one replica but my favorite feature is to add in the mid control this gives you huge versatility and it does magical things when you place it before your OverDrive's or before your amps on the side we have the original low cut switch that was found on the top of the FA one and on this side we have a balanced output for direct box this is great for acoustic guitars and bass because this is a fantastic prix for those instruments when running in direct to a mixing desk output input and 9-volt power you're gonna like it one way that I love to use preamplifier pedals is to put them before my big clean fender style amps like my Saab Tech MIG 50 these amps have a lot of low-end they have a lot of body but when you take a good preamp you can reshape those frequencies and make the tone a lot clearer in certain situations [Applause] another favorite way of mine to use a preamplifier pedal is to put it before my favorite overdrive pedals I'll leave those overdrive pedals on but engage the preamp free overdrive and cause more grit and more turn the volume way up cut the lows and boost those highs it's almost like a treble booster meets a Vox but it makes something magical with a Fender amp that otherwise was it possible another really your delays are clear your reverbs are more pristine and your overall sound cuts to the mix just like you don't need a clover to do all these sounds this might be the perfect one for you it might have
